title: Optimizing DFFs whose initial value prevents their value from changing

features.name: DFF with constant-propagating initial value feedback
features.description: Code should include a register with an initial block that sets it to 0, followed by a sequential always block where the next value is computed as a logical AND of input and current register value, causing the register to remain constant

features.name: multi-bit register with initial value and feedback
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit register with an initial value where the next value computation causes individual bits to remain constant based on their initial state
